mapper.update: UPDATE INVENTORY SET QTY = QTY - #{quantity} WHERE ITEMID = #{itemId}
mapper.select: SELECT QTY FROM INVENTORY WHERE ITEMID = #{itemId}

SELECT ITEMID AS itemId, PRODUCTID AS productId, LISTPRICE AS listPrice, UNITCOST AS unitCost, SUPPLIER AS supplierId, STATUS AS status, ATTR1 AS attribute1, ATTR2 AS attribute2, ATTR3 AS attribute3, ATTR4 AS attribute4, ATTR5 AS attribute5 FROM ITEM WHERE PRODUCTID = #{productId}

SELECT ITEMID AS itemId, PRODUCTID AS productId, LISTPRICE AS listPrice, UNITCOST AS unitCost, SUPPLIER AS supplierId, STATUS AS status, ATTR1 AS attribute1, ATTR2 AS attribute2, ATTR3 AS attribute3, ATTR4 AS attribute4, ATTR5 AS attribute5 FROM ITEM WHERE ITEMID = #{itemId}

SELECT ITEMID AS itemId, PRODUCTID AS productId, LISTPRICE AS listPrice, UNITCOST AS unitCost, SUPPLIER AS supplierId, STATUS AS status, ATTR1 AS attribute1, ATTR2 AS attribute2, ATTR3 AS attribute3, ATTR4 AS attribute4, ATTR5 AS attribute5 FROM ITEM WHERE ATTR1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ATTR2 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ATTR3 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ATTR4 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ATTR5 LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
